summary: Implemented the scoped issue and updated verification.
notes: Ran npm test and npm run validate:json.

discoveredIssues.title: Verifier treats status words in summaries as hard failures
discoveredIssues.body: The verifier rejected an otherwise passing run because the builder summary mentioned a legacy status name.
discoveredIssues.expected: Only actual verification failures should block PR creation.
discoveredIssues.evidence: verifier.log showed a must_fix from builder summary text.
